sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Move the magenta square at (31-32, 28-29) one more time
# Top-left is (31, 28)
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 31, 'col': 28}])

after = current_frame.segmentation
m_positions = []
for n in after['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'M' and n['pixels'] == 4:
        b = n['boundary']
        r = (min([p[0] for p in b]), max([p[0] for p in b]), min([p[1] for p in b]), max([p[1] for p in b]))
        m_positions.append(r)

print(f"Magenta positions: {sorted(m_positions)}")
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")
print(f"Gameplay changed: {last_action_result.get('gameplay_changed')}")

# Check blue circle
blue_circle = None
for n in after['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] > 20:
        blue_circle = n
        break

if blue_circle:
    bc_boundary = blue_circle['boundary']
    bc_min_r = min([p[0] for p in bc_boundary])
    bc_max_r = max([p[0] for p in bc_boundary])
    bc_min_c = min([p[1] for p in bc_boundary])
    bc_max_c = max([p[1] for p in bc_boundary])
    print(f"Blue circle: rows {bc_min_r}-{bc_max_r}, cols {bc_min_c}-{bc_max_c}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
